items.title: US, Iran Trade Wave of Attacks as Tehran Says Hormuz Closed
items.description: US forces struck Iran for a third time in a week, prompting retaliatory attacks from Tehran as it declared the Strait of Hormuz would be closed “until further notice.”

items.title: Typhoon Bavi Weakens as Heavy Rain Spreads Across China
items.description: China’s National Meteorological Center said Typhoon Bavi weakened to a severe tropical storm on Sunday morning after making landfall in Zhejiang.
